subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen calleth unto Its loved ones from the precincts of the Prison, and summoneth them unto the highest horizon this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی دوستان خود را از شطر سجن ندا میفرماید و بافق اعلی میخواند امروز
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @wisdom [hikmat]
